text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur—an Umamusume governed by logic.
Although she seems annoyed after her
conversation with Fine Motion, she still seems
curious about her data.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is convinced that Fine Motion is
clearly different from other Umamusume... and
that she might have what it takes to change
Shakur's own fate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then tells me something quite intriguing.
"Keep an eye on her. Your job is to keep her
running right up to the very end."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what exactly she sees in Fine Motion,
but I take Air Shakur's words to heart.
